purpose: Foreign companies investing (or positioned to invest) in India's focus sectors, paired with the government initiative that is their vehicle -- each pairing grounded in the trade-policy program's PIB-verified record (PRIDs cited where the pairing is verified; PROSPECTIVE marked where the lane exists but the company's entry is announced/expected rather than scheme-approved). Listed-parent tickers given so the pairing is investable/trackable.

verified_pairs.initiative: PLI-LSEM (first incentive approved, PRID 1885189) -> MPMS successor lane + ECMS components
PLI-LSEM beneficiary (PRID 1662096); Noida plant (PRID 1538166) -> MPMS lane
India Semiconductor Mission ATMP, Sanand (unit approved 2023; ISM unit list)
Technology partner of the Tata Dholera fab (Cabinet approval Feb-2024, PRID 2010132)
CG Power ATMP JV (Cabinet approval Feb-2024, PRID 2010132)
PLI Auto ecosystem via Maruti Suzuki; EV exports from India (e-Vitara line)
PLI Auto participant -- CAUTION: affiliate Hyundai Global Motors' 20 GWh ACC award vanished from DHI documents (registry finding)
PLI White Goods (AC/LED components) -- note beneficiary-list attrition 85->80
PLI White Goods compressor/component localization lane
POSCO-JSW $7.73bn JV MoU -- NEGATIVE FINDING: no EC application on PARIVESH register; Specialty Steel R1.2 is the live lane
PLI Specialty Steel participant via AM/NS; R1.2 MoUs (Feb-2026)
PLI Solar Tranche-II LoA cohort (SECI awards, Apr-2023) + ALMM enlistment

Semicon 2.0 equipment pillar; India supplier-ecosystem commitments announced
C295 Vadodara line with Tata (defence corridor); MRO GST/royalty concessions; HS88 remains an uncovered import head -- the gap is the opportunity

prospective_pairs.initiative: NIPU-2026: 8-9 gas-based plants, RoE band 12-16%, forex-risk mitigation (PRID 2284800)

method_note: Verified pairs come from PIB releases, Cabinet approvals and ministry unit-lists collected by the trade-policy program (india-trade-sector-policy-recommendations); prospective pairs name the Cabinet-approved lane and the company's publicly announced India intent. The negative findings (POSCO EC absence, Hyundai ACC lapse, White Goods attrition) are retained deliberately -- pairing quality includes knowing which pairings are stalled.
